## Meeting Purpose

[Project updates and planning for website improvements, including pricing page, blog, and about us page.](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pricing page design is finalized and ready for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Blog and default.com pages need further definition; Jason to provide more details](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [About Us page development pending more information from Jason](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Team to start with default.com page updates, followed by blog improvements](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

## Topics

### Website Copycat Concern

  - [Jason discovered a website that appears to have copied growthx.ai's design and tagline](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Guille suggested tweeting about the issue as a potential response](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Pricing Page Progress

  - [Design team delivered final version of pricing page](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Jason reviewed and approved the design](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Decision made to remove pricing section from homepage and link directly to new pricing page](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

### Blog Page Improvements

  - [Current blog post lacks proper formatting (H2s, paragraphs)](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

  - [Team to wait for a better sample post from Jason before proceeding with design updates](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

### Default.com Page Updates

  - [Jason to define image content ideas soon](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

  - [Further definition and research needed before proceeding with design](https://fathom.video/share/DsssZbMzsryqxrcEyiyz7zuCu1K-M5t4?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
